== Evans Gambit Declined ==
===4... Bb6===

Black declines the gambit by playing 4... Bb6. Black refuses to give White the opportunity to gain tempo and hangs onto the center. However, White can play [[/5. a4/]] with plans to play 6. a5 later on to trap the bishop.

{{ChessFooter}}
